items.title_en: John Ternus to become Apple CEO
items.title_zh: 约翰·特诺斯将任苹果公司 CEO
items.summary_en: Apple has announced a leadership transition with Tim Cook moving to executive chairman and John Ternus named CEO, signaling a planned succession. Ternus, a veteran hardware and product operations leader, would steer Apple’s product roadmap and hardware/software integration in the next era. The move underscores Apple’s emphasis on continuity and a hardware-centric strategy.
items.summary_zh: 苹果宣布高层交接，蒂姆·库克将出任执行董事长，约翰·特诺斯接任 CEO。特诺斯长期担任硬件/产品运营负责人，接任后将引领苹果的产品路线与硬件/软件协同。此举突显苹果在保持连续性和以硬件驱动战略方面的长期规划。

items.title_en: All phones sold in the EU to have replaceable batteries from 2027
items.title_zh: 到2027年，欧盟销售的所有手机将配备可更换电池
items.summary_en: The EU will require replaceable batteries in all phones starting 2027, aiming to extend device lifespans and reduce e-waste. The rule could force redesigns, disrupt supply chains, and influence consumer costs.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟将于2027年要求所有手机具备可更换电池，旨在延长设备寿命并减少电子垃圾。此举可能迫使厂商重新设计，影响供应链并提高一些消费者成本。

items.title_en: AI Resistance: some recent anti-AI stuff that’s worth discussing
items.title_zh: AI 抵抗：一些值得讨论的近期反 AI 动向
items.summary_en: A survey of recent anti‑AI activity and policy debates outlines tensions between innovation, safety, and compensation for creators. It highlights calls for stronger regulation, ethical guidelines, and fair use concerns. For technologists, it signals the policy landscape shaping AI adoption and the need for responsible innovation.
items.summary_zh: 对最近的反 AI 动态与政策辩论进行梳理，揭示创新、安全与创作者报酬之间的张力。内容涉及更强监管、伦理准则与公平使用等议题。对技术人而言，这描绘了影响 AI 采用的政策环境与负责任创新的方向。

items.title_en: At long last, InfoWars is ours
items.title_zh: InfoWars 终于落入我们手中
items.summary_en: A satirical piece that imagines InfoWars is now under 'our' control, lampooning who holds influence over controversial media. It skewers the politics of narrative ownership and the allure of power in modern information ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 一篇讽刺性短文，设想 InfoWars 已经落入“我们”之手，嘲讽争议性媒体的影响力归属与信息控制的魅力。通过幽默揭示现代信息生态中的权力幻觉与博弈。

items.title_en: Kimi K2.6: Advancing open-source coding
items.title_zh: Kimi K2.6：推进开源编码
items.summary_en: Kimi releases version K2.6, advancing open-source coding tooling. The update signals ongoing momentum in OSS tooling to improve developer workflows and build quality for modern applications.
items.summary_zh: Kimi 发布了 K2.6 版本，推动开源编码工具的发展。更新凸显 OSS 工具链在提升开发者工作流和现代应用构建质量方面的持续势头。

items.title_en: OpenAI ad partner now selling ChatGPT ad placements based on “prompt relevance”
items.title_zh: OpenAI 广告合作伙伴现依据“提示相关性”销售 ChatGPT 广告位
items.summary_en: An OpenAI ad partner is reportedly selling ChatGPT ad placements based on prompt relevance, suggesting a shift to contextualized advertising within AI chat experiences. The leaked deck hints at programmable targeting that could reshape how brands buy AI-native inventory. This raises questions about measurement, privacy, and monetization in AI advertising.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，OpenAI 的广告合作伙伴正基于“提示相关性”销售 ChatGPT 广告位，标志着在 AI 聊天体验中向情境化广告的转变。泄露的演示文稿暗示了可编程的定向策略，可能改变品牌对 AI 原生广告位的购买方式。此举引发对衡量、隐私与 AI 广告营收模式的讨论。

items.title_en: How to make a fast dynamic language interpreter
items.title_zh: 如何打造高效的动态语言解释器
items.summary_en: This piece surveys architecture choices for a fast dynamic language interpreter, weighing the trade-offs between interpretation, compilation, and JIT techniques. It highlights practical optimizations such as inline caches, bytecode representations, tracing JIT, and data-layout choices that push performance without sacrificing dynamism.
items.summary_zh: 本文讨论快速动态语言解释器的设计取舍，权衡解释、编译和JIT等技术。介绍字节码表示、内联缓存、跟踪编译等实际优化，以及在不牺牲动态性的前提下提升性能的数据结构选择。

items.title_en: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview: Smarter, Sharper, Still Evolving
items.title_zh: Qwen3.6-Max 预览版：更智能、更敏锐，仍在进化
items.summary_en: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview demonstrates stronger performance and sharper reasoning, with ongoing improvements in safety and efficiency. This preview signals continued evolution of the Qwen model line as an open AI competitor in the space.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview 展示了更强的性能与更精确的推理，同时在安全性和效率方面有所提升。该预览表明 Qwen 系列仍在持续进化，成为开放式 AI 竞争中的有力对手。

items.title_en: Jujutsu megamerges for fun and profit
items.title_zh: 咒术大并购：为了乐趣与利润
items.summary_en: The post uses a Jungian metaphor of jujutsu megamergers to examine large-scale M&A activity, weighing potential synergies against integration risk and regulatory friction. It argues that while consolidation can unlock value, misaligned deals often destroy more than they create. For readers, it’s a lens on strategic playbooks in tech markets.
items.summary_zh: 文章以‘咒术’隐喻探讨大型并购活动，权衡潜在协同效应与整合风险及监管摩擦。作者认为，尽管并购能创造价值，但若目标错配往往适得其反。读者可通过该视角理解科技市场中的战略博弈。

items.title_en: F-35 is built for the wrong war
items.title_zh: F-35：为错误的战争打造的杰作
items.summary_en: A critique argues the F-35 program is optimized for a hypothetical war that doesn’t reflect current threat realities, focusing on cost, interoperability, and doctrine alignment. The piece invites reevaluation of defense procurement and emphasizes the need for open, adaptable systems. For tech readers, it’s a case study in aligning hardware programs with real-world use cases.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 F-35 项目为一种与现实威胁不符的假设战争进行了优化，批评成本、互操作性与作战理念的错配。该观点推动对国防采购的再评估，强调需要更开放、可适应的系统。对于科技读者而言，这是一个将硬件计划与真实应用对齐的案例研究。

items.title_en: Even 'uncensored' models can't say what they want
items.title_zh: 即使是‘不受审查’的模型也说不出它们想说的内容
items.summary_en: The article argues that even uncensored AI models operate under hard constraints—through training data, alignment efforts, and policy defaults—limiting what they can output. It discusses implications for freedom of expression and the design of future language models.
items.summary_zh: 即便是“未审查”的模型，也受到训练数据、对齐目标和安全策略等硬性约束的影响，导致它们无法随心所欲输出内容。文章讨论对未来语言模型设计的影响与取舍。

items.title_en: GitHub's fake star economy
items.title_zh: GitHub 的假星星经济
items.summary_en: Researchers allege manipulation of GitHub stars, suggesting fake engagement to inflate repository popularity. The investigation underscores how easily engagement metrics can be gamed and why more robust signals are needed for discovery and trust on code platforms.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员指控 GitHub 仓库存在通过假互动提升星标数以美化热度的现象。此事凸显互动指标易被操纵的风险，并推动平台加强对发现与信任的更稳健衡量方法。

items.title_en: Atlassian enables default data collection to train AI
items.title_zh: Atlassian 启用默认数据收集以训练 AI
items.summary_en: Atlassian plans to enable default data collection to train AI across its product suite, accelerating model improvements through user interactions. The move boosts AI-powered features but raises privacy, data governance, and policy questions for enterprises.
items.summary_zh: Atlassian 计划在其产品套件中默认收集数据用于训练 AI，从而通过用户交互来加速模型改进。这提升了 AI 驱动的功能，但也引发隐私、数据治理与企业政策方面的担忧。

items.title_en: We accepted surveillance as default
items.title_zh: 我们把监控视为默认
items.summary_en: A reflexive take on how surveillance has become the default in society, examining design choices and cultural norms that normalize data collection. It advocates rethinking defaults toward stronger privacy protections.
items.summary_zh: 这篇反思性文章探讨监控如何成为社会默认，审视设计选择与文化规范对数据收集的常态化影响。呼吁将默认设定重新导向更强的隐私保护。

items.title_en: Deezer says 44% of songs uploaded to its platform daily are AI-generated
items.title_zh: Deezer 每日上传音乐中有 44% 为 AI 生成
items.summary_en: Deezer reports that a substantial share of daily uploads are AI-generated, highlighting the tension between AI creativity and licensing. The trend raises questions about rights, attribution, and how platforms manage AI-created content.
items.summary_zh: Deezer 报告每日上传中相当比例为 AI 生成，凸显 AI 创作与版权之间的张力。此趋势引发关于授权、署名与平台如何管理 AI 内容的讨论。

items.title_en: Sauna effect on heart rate
items.title_zh: 桑拿对心率的影响
items.summary_en: A study quantifies how sauna sessions affect heart rate, providing data-driven insights into cardiovascular responses. The findings help calibrate safe sauna practices and health guidance.
items.summary_zh: 研究量化了桑拿对心率的影响，为心血管反应提供数据支撑。结果可用于制定安全的桑拿使用建议与健康指引。

items.title_en: Kimi vendor verifier – verify accuracy of inference providers
items.title_zh: Kimi 厂商验证器：验证推理提供商的准确性
items.summary_en: Kimi launches a vendor verifier to assess the accuracy of AI inference providers, addressing reliability concerns in enterprise AI purchases. The tool likely standardizes benchmarks and governance checks, helping buyers compare model quality across vendors. As enterprises lean on third‑party inference, verifiable performance becomes a strategic gatekeeper.
items.summary_zh: Kimi 推出厂商验证器，用以评估 AI 推理提供商的准确性，解决企业在采购时对可靠性的担忧。该工具可能提供标准化的基准与治理检查，帮助买家对比不同供应商的模型质量。随着企业对推理能力的依赖，具可验证性能的能力变得日益关键。

items.title_en: Not buying another Kindle
items.title_zh: 不再买下一代 Kindle
items.summary_en: The piece argues against upgrading to the next Kindle, weighing current device value, ecosystem, and price against incremental improvements. It discusses display tech, battery life, and audiobook integration as factors. The conclusion is a cautious stance on upgrading, with suggestions of alternative devices or continued use of current Kindle.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张不升级下一代 Kindle，比较当前设备的价值、生态系统与价格对比潜在改进。讨论显示技术、电池寿命及有声书整合等因素。结论是对升级持谨慎态度，并给出替代设备或继续使用现有 Kindle 的建议。

items.title_en: ggsql: A Grammar of Graphics for SQL
items.title_zh: ggsql：SQL 的图形语法框架（草案版）
items.summary_en: ggsql introduces a graphics-style grammar for SQL, enabling charting directly from queries. The alpha release hints at a path toward more declarative, graphics-first analytics workflows.
items.summary_zh: ggsql 提出了一套面向 SQL 的图形语法，使图表可以直接基于查询生成。Alpha 版本暗示了向更具声明性、以图形为优先的分析工作流迈进的方向。

items.title_en: NSA is using Anthropic's Mythos despite blacklist
items.title_zh: NSA 尽管在黑名单中仍使用 Anthropic 的 Mythos
items.summary_en: NSA reportedly continues to use Anthropic's Mythos despite being blacklisted, highlighting tensions between security needs and governance of AI tools. The episode raises questions about policy, risk management, and how agencies weigh model access.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，NSA 尽管 Mythos 已被列入黑名单，仍在使用该模型，凸显安全需求与 AI 使用治理之间的矛盾。此事引发对政策、风险管理以及机构权衡模型访问的讨论。

items.title_en: At Long Last, InfoWars Is Ours
items.title_zh: InfoWars 终于成了我们的
items.summary_en: A satirical note imagining InfoWars as finally under our control, underscoring the meme-like ideas around information sovereignty and media power.
items.summary_zh: 一则讽刺笔记，设想 InfoWars 终于落入我们掌控之中，凸显信息主权与媒体力量的梗式讨论。

items.title_en: Quantum Computers Are Not a Threat to 128-Bit Symmetric Keys
items.title_zh: 量子计算对128位对称密钥并非威胁
items.summary_en: The piece explains that quantum computers are not an immediate risk to 128-bit symmetric keys; Grover's algorithm would require impractical resources to break them soon. It reassures cryptographers about near-term security margins.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释量子计算并非对128位对称密钥的直接威胁；利用 Grover 算法在短期内要实现破解需要巨大的资源。为近期香港的安全裕度提供安抚作用。

items.title_en: We got 207 tok/s with Qwen3.5-27B on an RTX 3090
items.title_zh: 在 RTX 3090 上用 Qwen3.5-27B 实现 207 tok/s
items.summary_en: A benchmark claims 207 tokens per second on a single RTX 3090 using Qwen3.5-27B, highlighting how consumer GPUs can handle mid‑sized LLM workloads with clever optimization. The result underscores the viability of desktop hardware for AI experimentation, lowering the barrier to entry for researchers and hobbyists. It also hints at the importance of software efficiency in practical AI deployments.
items.summary_zh: 在单块 RTX 3090 上，使用 Qwen3.5-27B 实现约 207 tok/s 的推理速度，展示了消费级显卡对中等规模模型的潜力与优化空间。该结果凸显桌面硬件在 AI 试验中的可行性，降低了研究者和爱好者进入门槛，同时强调软件效率在实际 AI 部署中的重要性。

items.title_en: Soul Player C64 – A real transformer running on a 1 MHz Commodore 64
items.title_zh: Soul Player C64：在1MHz Commodore 64上运行的真实 Transformer
items.summary_en: A retro AI project demonstrates a Transformer model running on a 1 MHz Commodore 64, pushing the boundaries of what’s possible on vintage hardware. The effort highlights optimization tricks, memory management, and low-power inference strategies that make AI feasible on extreme constraints. It’s a playful yet instructive reminder that edge AI can start with hardware you already own.
items.summary_zh: 一项复古 AI 项目在 1MHz 的 Commodore 64 上实现了 Transformer 模型，挑战了这类老旧硬件的边界。该工作展示了内存管理、模型优化和低功耗推理等技巧，使 AI 推理在极限约束下成为可能。这个案例既有趣又具启发性，提醒我们边缘 AI 的起点可以是手边的旧设备。

items.title_en: Monero Community Crowdfunding System
items.title_zh: Monero 社区众筹系统
items.summary_en: The Monero community launches a crowdfunding system to solicit ideas and fund proposals from within the ecosystem, with a transparent process for proposal submission and voting. It aims to mobilize developer and researcher support while keeping the project's decentralized ethos.
items.summary_zh: Monero 社区推出众筹系统，用于征集并资助生态系统内的提案，采用透明的提案提交与投票机制。旨在动员开发和研究者参与，同时保持去中心化货币的理念。

items.title_en: M 7.4 earthquake – 100 km ENE of Miyako, Japan
items.title_zh: 日本宫古以东约100公里发生7.4级地震
items.summary_en: An earthquake of magnitude 7.4 occurred roughly 100 km ENE of Miyako, Japan. Seismic monitoring and aftershock planning are ongoing, with authorities advising preparedness for potential tremors and damage.
items.summary_zh: 日本宫古以东约100公里发生7.4级地震。地震监测与余震预警正在进行，相关部门提醒公众保持警惕并做好防灾准备。

items.title_en: WebUSB Extension for Firefox
items.title_zh: Firefox 的 WebUSB 扩展
items.summary_en: A Firefox WebUSB extension enables web apps to access USB devices directly, expanding browser hardware access while raising security considerations. This work illustrates ongoing efforts to bring hardware interoperability to the web.
items.summary_zh: Firefox 的 WebUSB 扩展使网页应用能够直接访问 USB 设备，在扩展浏览器对硬件的接入能力的同时，也带来安全方面的考量，体现了将硬件互操作性带到网页的持续努力。

items.title_en: Vercel April 2026 security incident
items.title_zh: Vercel 2026 年 4 月安全事件披露
items.summary_en: Vercel disclosed a security incident from April 2026, detailing what happened, the affected services, and the steps they took to contain and remediate. The disclosure underscores how even modern cloud platforms can face complex attacks, stressing the importance of monitoring, rapid incident response, and proactive customer credential hygiene.
items.summary_zh: Vercel 披露了 2026 年 4 月的安全事件，说明了事件经过、受影响的服务以及应对和修复措施。这次披露凸显了即便是现代云平台也会遭遇复杂攻击，强调监控、快速响应和客户凭据安全的重要性。

items.title_en: OpenClaw isn't fooling me. I remember MS-DOS
items.title_zh: OpenClaw 骗不了我，我记得 MS-DOS
items.summary_en: The piece casts doubt on OpenClaw, arguing for the virtues of simpler, offline computing reminiscent of MS-DOS. It also stresses the need for rigorous security when deploying local AI agents.
items.summary_zh: 文章对 OpenClaw 持保留态度，强调简洁离线计算的优点，类似于 MS-DOS 的思路。同时强调在本地部署 AI 代理时需要强有力的安全设计。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How to solve the cold start problem for a two-sided marketplace?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：如何解决双边市场的冷启动问题？
items.summary_en: A discussion on strategies to tackle cold-start for two-sided marketplaces, including demand seeding, onboarding incentives, and growth loops to kickstart network effects.
items.summary_zh: 讨论应对双边市场冷启动的策略，涵盖需求引导、入驻激励和增长循环等，推动早期网络效应的建立。

items.title_en: I prompted ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini and watched my Nginx logs
items.title_zh: 我向 ChatGPT、Claude、Perplexity 与 Gemini 发出提示并查看 Nginx 日志
items.summary_en: A practical look at how prompts to multiple AI models appear in Nginx logs, revealing patterns in AI traffic versus referrals. It highlights implications for measuring AI usage and mitigating bot traffic.
items.summary_zh: 实操观察向多家 AI 模型提示在 Nginx 日志中的表现，揭示 AI 流量与推荐流量的模式。强调对 AI 使用量的度量与流量治理的启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: Alien – Self-hosting with remote management (written in Rust)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Alien——用 Rust 编写的远程管理自托管解决方案
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces Alien, a Rust-based self-hosting platform with remote management capabilities. It demonstrates how Rust and orchestration tools can simplify running personal servers at scale.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍 Alien，这是一个用 Rust 编写的自托管平台，具备远程管理能力。展示了 Rust 与编排工具如何在大规模运行个人服务器时简化运维。

items.title_en: The Theory of Interstellar Trade [pdf] (1978)
items.title_zh: 星际贸易理论（1978）
items.summary_en: A classic 1978 thought experiment that extends trade theory to interstellar commerce, showing how transport costs and economies of scale shape exchanges between worlds. It serves as a playful yet instructive lens on macro modeling and international trade logic.
items.summary_zh: 这是1978年的经典思考实验，将贸易理论扩展到星际贸易，展示运输成本与规模经济如何影响星际间的交换。它以玩笑但具启发性的方式，帮助理解宏观模型和国际贸易逻辑。

items.title_en: The Palantir's Stasi Protocols
items.title_zh: 帕兰蒂尔的斯塔西协议
items.summary_en: Critiques Palantir's data practices as reminiscent of Stasi-era protocols, raising concerns about surveillance, civil liberties, and accountability in data-driven software.
items.summary_zh: 批评 Palantir 的数据实践被比作斯塔西式协议，提出对监控、公民自由与问责的关切，尤其在数据驱动的软件环境下。

items.title_en: Brussels launched an age checking app. Hackers took 2 minutes to break it
items.title_zh: 布鲁塞尔推出年龄验证应用，黑客两分钟就破解了
items.summary_en: Hackers reportedly cracked Brussels’ age-check app within two minutes, exposing vulnerabilities in a government digital tool. The breach underscores the difficulty of designing robust privacy- and safety-focused checks and raises questions about deployment practices and responsible disclosure. It serves as a cautionary tale for public‑sector app rollouts.
items.summary_zh: 据称黑客在两分钟内破解了布鲁塞尔的年龄验证应用，暴露政府数字工具的脆弱性。此事件凸显在隐私与安全检查方面设计的挑战，也引发对部署实践与披露责任的讨论。对公共部门应用上线具有警示作用。

items.title_en: Stop trying to engineer your way out of listening to people
items.title_zh: 停止用工程手段回避倾听他人
items.summary_en: The piece argues that listening is the core issue, not process design. It emphasizes feedback loops and user-centric work practices to capture voices, warning that automation can’t replace human listening.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为倾听才是关键问题，而不是简单地改造流程。通过强调反馈循环和更贴近用户的工作方式，文章点出技术解决方案无法替代真实的人类倾听。

items.title_en: Show HN: Holos – QEMU/KVM with a compose-style YAML, GPUs and health checks
items.title_zh: Show HN: Holos——使用类似 compose 的 YAML、GPU 与健康检查的 QEMU/KVM
items.summary_en: Holos introduces a compose-like declarative YAML for configuring QEMU/KVM deployments, including GPU passthrough and health checks. It aims to simplify complex virtualization setups and improve reliability through automated validation.
items.summary_zh: Holos 引入类似 compose 的 YAML 声明式配置来管理 QEMU/KVM 虚拟化环境，支持 GPU 直通和健康检查。目标是简化复杂的虚拟化部署并通过自动化校验提高可靠性。

items.title_en: Tim Cook Stepping Down
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克将卸任
items.summary_en: Tim Cook is stepping down as Apple CEO, with leadership transition underway. The report notes that John Ternus is slated to take the helm, signaling a generational shift. The move could influence Apple’s strategic priorities and culture as the company navigates future product cycles and competitive pressures.
items.summary_zh: 蒂姆·库克将卸任苹果公司 CEO，领导层正在进行交接。据称约翰·特诺斯将接任，这标志着代际转型。此举可能在未来的产品路线和企业文化上对苹果产生影响。

items.title_en: Notion leaks email addresses of all editors of any public page
items.title_zh: Notion 泄露公开页面编辑者的邮箱地址
items.summary_en: Notion reportedly leaked email addresses for editors of any public page, widening phishing and social-engineering risks for those editors. The exposure underscores how collaboration platforms can inadvertently leak contact data, prompting urgent checks on access, password hygiene, and alerting for targeted scams.
items.summary_zh: Notion 被曝公开页面编辑者的邮箱地址，扩大了他们遭遇钓鱼与社工攻击的风险。此类暴露凸显协作工具对外共享联系信息的潜在隐患，需紧急检查权限、提升密码安全并警惕定向诈骗。

items.title_en: IEA: Solar overtakes all energy sources in a major global first
items.title_zh: IEA：全球首次太阳能超越所有能源来源
items.summary_en: The IEA reports solar overtook all energy sources as the largest source of global electricity, a historic first.
items.summary_zh: 国际能源署宣布太阳能成为全球最大的电力来源，首次超越所有能源。文章讨论对电网、储能和政策的影响，随着太阳能份额持续增长。

items.title_en: Figma's woes compound with Claude Design
items.title_zh: Figma 的困境因 Claude Design 而加剧
items.summary_en: The piece argues that Figma’s challenges are compounded by Claude Design’s entry, intensifying competition in design tooling and AI-assisted workflows. It discusses implications for pricing, feature parity, and platform strategy as AI features blur tool boundaries. Readers should watch how Figma adapts to this evolving AI-enabled design landscape.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 Figma 的挑战因 Claude Design 的进入而加剧，扩大了设计工具市场的竞争与 AI 辅助工作流的压力。讨论定价、功能对等与平台战略的影响，因为 AI 特性正在模糊工具边界。读者应关注 Figma 如何应对日益 AI 化的设计生态。

items.title_en: NASA Artemis Posters
items.title_zh: NASA 阿尔忒弥斯计划海报
items.summary_en: NASA released Artemis posters featuring themes of lunar exploration and mission design, useful for outreach and education.
items.summary_zh: NASA 发布了阿尔忒弥斯计划的海报，凸显月球探测与任务设计主题，适用于科普与教育传播。

items.title_en: 2,100 Swiss municipalities showing which provider handles their official email
items.title_zh: 2100 个瑞士自治市政体公开官方邮箱提供商
items.summary_en: A dataset showing which providers manage official emails for Swiss municipalities, highlighting security, sovereignty, and procurement fragmentation. It sheds light on public-sector cloud dependencies.
items.summary_zh: 这份数据集揭示了瑞士两千多自治市在官方邮箱服务商方面的选择及分布，反映出采购分散、云服务依赖及安全治理的挑战。对公共部门的信息安全、合规和供应商锁定具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Claude Token Counter, now with model comparisons
items.title_zh: Claude Token Counter，现在支持模型对比
items.summary_en: Claude Token Counter now supports cross-model comparisons, helping developers estimate token costs and compare efficiency across Claude models. This aids model selection and budgeting for NLP projects.
items.summary_zh: Claude Token Counter 增加了跨模型的对比功能，便于开发者对不同模型的代币消耗进行比对与成本估算。新功能有助于选型与预算控制，优化提示设计。

items.title_en: U.S. banks may soon collect citizenship data from customers
items.title_zh: 美国银行或将开始收集客户公民身份信息
items.summary_en: US banks may start collecting citizenship data from customers, raising privacy concerns and regulatory questions about how this data is used and stored.
items.summary_zh: 美国银行可能开始向客户收集公民身份信息，引发隐私与监管问题，关注数据如何使用与存储。

items.title_en: Turtle WoW classic server announces shutdown after Blizzard wins injunction
items.title_zh: 在暴雪胜诉禁令后 Turtle WoW 经典服务器宣布关闭
items.summary_en: Turtle WoW, a private World of Warcraft Classic server, announced shutdown after Blizzard won an injunction. The move underscores IP enforcement dynamics in the private-server space and the ongoing tension between fan-run servers and game publishers.
items.summary_zh: 在暴雪获得禁令后，Turtle WoW 经典私服宣布关闭。这凸显了私服领域在知识产权执法方面的压力，以及玩家社区与发行商之间的持续博弈。

items.title_en: Show HN: Run TRELLIS.2 Image-to-3D generation natively on Apple Silicon
items.title_zh: Show HN：在 Apple Silicon 上原生运行 TRELLIS.2 的图像转3D 生成
items.summary_en: TRELLIS.2 enables image-to-3D generation, and this build runs natively on Apple Silicon, suggesting optimized performance for Macs with M-series chips. This lowers hardware barriers for offline, on-device AI content creation and could influence Mac-focused AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: TRELLIS.2 实现图像到3D 的生成，且在 Apple Silicon 上实现原生运行，表现在对 M1/M2 的优化能显著提升速度与离线工作能力。此举降低了对高端云算力的依赖，利于本地创作和跨平台工具链的开发。

items.title_en: Changes in the system prompt between Claude Opus 4.6 and 4.7
items.title_zh: Claude Opus 4.6 与 4.7 的系统提示变更
items.summary_en: Describes updates to the model's system prompt between Claude Opus 4.6 and 4.7, showcasing how tiny prompt design changes can affect behavior, safety, and output style. The note emphasizes the importance of prompt engineering on LLMs and how platform updates can shift capabilities and guardrails.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了 Claude Opus 4.6 与 4.7 的系统提示变更，展示了微小的提示设计差异对模型行为、安全边界和输出风格的影响。强调提示工程在大型语言模型中的重要性，以及平台更新如何改变能力与约束。

items.title_en: 10 years ago, someone wrote a test for Servo that included an expiry in 2026
items.title_zh: 十年前，某人给 Servo 的测试设定了到2026年的过期日期
items.summary_en: A quirky note from a decade ago reveals a Servo test embedded with an expiry date in 2026, illustrating long-running projects and their testing lifecycles.
items.summary_zh: 十年前的一条有趣记录显示，Servo 的一个测试设定了在2026年过期，揭示了长期运行的项目在测试与维护周期上的趣味性与挑战。

items.title_en: The seven programming ur-languages (2022)
items.title_zh: 编程之祖：七种原始语言（2022）
items.summary_en: The post surveys seven foundational languages that shaped modern programming, tracing how concepts from these roots influence today’s language design and tooling. It also reflects on what we gain by revisiting these roots, and which ideas still matter for building robust, expressive software.
items.summary_zh: 本文梳理了七种塑造现代编程的基础语言，追溯其思想如何影响当今的语言设计与工具链。回顾根源可以帮助理解当代语言的优缺点，哪些理念在构建健壮且高效的软件时仍然重要。

items.title_en: The Bromine Chokepoint
items.title_zh: 溴资源成为全球记忆芯片生产的瓶颈
items.summary_en: Bromine is a key input in several semiconductor processes, and ongoing strife in the Middle East could disrupt its supply, potentially bottlenecking memory-chip production. The result could be higher costs and tighter supply for DRAM and flash devices, underscoring geopolitical risk in chemical supply chains. Diversification and alternative manufacturing paths become strategic levers for the industry.
items.summary_zh: 中东局势可能打断全球记忆体芯片生产对溴供应的依赖，造成产量受限与价格波动。溴在芯片制造中的关键作用使其成为脆弱的供应瓶颈。这凸显了供应多元化和替代工艺的重要性。

items.title_en: The RAM shortage could last years
items.title_zh: RAM短缺可能持续数年
items.summary_en: RAM shortages driven by surging AI workloads and ongoing supply-chain constraints may persist for years, keeping memory prices volatile. Consumers could see higher prices and tighter availability for PCs and consumer devices, while data centers face tougher procurement as demand stays elevated. The situation underscores how AI demand can reshape even core hardware markets.
items.summary_zh: RAM 短缺可能持续多年，AI、云计算对内存的需求持续高位，叠加产能瓶颈。对消费电子和服务器市场将带来价格与库存的持续压力。

items.title_en: The creative software industry has declared war on Adobe
items.title_zh: 创意软件行业对 Adobe 的挑战
items.summary_en: Industry players are intensifying competition with more affordable, capable tools that threaten Adobe's monopoly on creative workflows. The piece surveys notable alternatives and product strategies aimed at teams and individual creators, signaling a shift toward open formats, better pricing, and interoperability.
items.summary_zh: 众多厂商通过更实惠、功能完善的工具挑战 Adobe 在创作工作流中的垄断地位。文章梳理了值得关注的替代品和产品策略，强调开源/开放格式、更友好的定价与互操作性正在成为潮流。

items.title_en: Stripe's Payment APIs: the first 10 years (2020)
items.title_zh: Stripe 的支付 API：自 2020 年起的前十年
items.summary_en: A retrospective on Stripe's payment API design as it marks a decade since 2020, outlining core principles that guided API evolution. It discusses lessons around developer ergonomics, reliability, versioning, and how to support growing payments without breaking integrations.
items.summary_zh: 回顾自 2020 年以来 Stripe 支付 API 的设计演进，披露驱动其发展的核心原则。探讨在开发者体验、可靠性、版本控制等方面的经验，以及在不破坏现有接入的前提下扩展支付能力的策略。

items.title_en: macOS 27 won’t be supporting Intel anymore
items.title_zh: macOS 27 将停止对 Intel 的支持
items.summary_en: Apple confirms macOS 27 will drop Intel support, accelerating the transition to Apple Silicon and impacting developers with legacy apps.
items.summary_zh: 苹果确认 macOS 27 将停止对 Intel 的支持，加速向 Apple Silicon 的过渡，影响开发者与遗留应用。

items.title_en: A Brief History of Fish Sauce
items.title_zh: 鱼露的简史
items.summary_en: A concise tour of fish sauce's history, from ancient fermentation to modern industrial production. Regional methods and long aging times built a globally distributed condiment that underpins Southeast Asian cuisine and today’s flavor economics.
items.summary_zh: 鱼露从古代发酵到现代工业化生产的简要演变。文章梳理了区域做法和漫长熟成如何让这一调味品走向全球，并影响了亚洲菜肴的风味与贸易格局。

items.title_en: Scientific datasets are riddled with copy-paste errors
items.title_zh: 科学数据集普遍存在拷贝粘贴错误
items.summary_en: Discusses pervasive quality issues in scientific datasets due to copy-paste errors, undermining reproducibility and ML training. Calls for stronger data curation, automated checks, and richer metadata practices.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出科学数据集中普遍存在拷贝粘贴等质量问题，严重影响结果的可复现性和机器学习模型的训练效果。提出通过数据清洗、自动化验证与元数据治理等手段提高数据质量。

items.title_en: AI chatbots could be making you stupider
items.title_zh: AI 聊天机器人可能让你变得更愚蠢
items.summary_en: BBC Future warns that AI chatbots could erode critical thinking and memory, urging design and literacy strategies to keep minds sharp. It emphasizes balancing convenience with cognitive skills.
items.summary_zh: BBC 未来专栏警示 AI 聊天机器人可能削弱批判性思维与记忆力，呼吁通过设计与数字素养策略维持认知能力。强调在便利性与认知技能之间寻求平衡。

items.title_en: Archive of BYTE magazine, starting with issue #1 in 1975
items.title_zh: Byte 杂志档案，起始于1975年第1期
items.summary_en: Archive of Byte magazine from 1975 onward provides a window into early microcomputer culture. It collects hardware hacks, software reviews, and stories that shaped early personal computing. For historians and tinkerers, it's a valuable snapshot of the era's ideas and constraints.
items.summary_zh: Byte 杂志档案为人们打开了1970年代末至1980年代初计算机文化的窗口。它汇集了硬件 hacks、软件评测以及塑造早期个人计算的故事。对于历史研究者和动手爱好者来说，这是了解那个时代思想与局限性的宝贵快照。

items.title_en: SPEAKE(a)R: Turn Speakers to Microphones for Fun and Profit [pdf] (2017)
items.title_zh: SPEAKE(a)R：将扬声器变成麦克风以实现乐趣与盈利（2017）
items.summary_en: Demonstrates that loudspeakers can be repurposed as microphones, enabling covert data capture via acoustic channels. The paper analyzes the hardware and signal-processing tricks that make this possible and discusses privacy and security implications for consumer devices and embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: 展示了扬声器可以被逆向用作麦克风，从而通过声学信道实现隐蔽数据获取。论文解析了实现这一方法的硬件与信号处理要点，并讨论了对消费电子和嵌入式系统的隐私与安全隐患及应对思路。

items.title_en: Show HN: Faceoff – A terminal UI for following NHL games
items.title_zh: Show HN: Faceoff — 跟踪 NHL 比赛的终端界面
items.summary_en: Faceoff is a terminal UI that lets fans follow NHL games from the command line. It emphasizes lightweight, real-time updates and keyboard-centric navigation, appealing to power users who prefer terminal workflows over web dashboards. The project illustrates how hobby CLIs can compete with polished GUI apps for niche needs.
items.summary_zh: Faceoff 是一个在终端跟踪 NHL 比赛的界面，提供实时更新和以键盘为中心的导航，面向偏好命令行工作流的用户。它展示了爱好者级 CLI 也能在小众场景与成熟 GUI 应用竞争。

items.title_en: Swiss AI Initiative (2023)
items.title_zh: 瑞士 AI 倡议（2023）
items.summary_en: An overview of Switzerland's 2023 national AI initiative, covering governance, ethics, funding, and industry collaboration. It underscores a commitment to responsible AI and workforce upskilling.
items.summary_zh: 这份 2023 年的瑞士 AI 倡议概括了国家层面的治理框架、伦理原则、研究资助与产业协作等要点。突出强调对负责任 AI 的追求以及相关人才再培训与产业生态建设。

items.title_en: Six Levels of Dark Mode (2024)
items.title_zh: 深色模式的六个层级
items.summary_en: Six levels of dark mode provide a practical framework that ranges from basic contrast tweaks to adaptive, accessible, and brand-aligned themes. Each level guides decisions about contrast, color temperature, readability, and motion to balance usability with consistency across platforms. The framework helps teams implement thoughtful, scalable theming.
items.summary_zh: 六个层级的深色模式为界面美学与可用性提供了一个实用分级框架，从对比度、色温到无障碍性与品牌一致性都给出设计路线。帮助团队在多平台间保持一致性，同时提升可用性。

items.title_en: Sudo for Windows (2024)
items.title_zh: Windows 的 sudo
items.summary_en: Microsoft introduces a sudo-like tool for Windows, enabling non-root commands with elevated privileges and unifying developer workflows with Linux environments. It signals a shift toward more Linux-style privilege management on Windows.
items.summary_zh: 微软推出 Windows 的 sudo 工具，让在 Windows 上的命令提升权限更加类似 Linux 的 sudo 行为。该功能有助于统一开发工作流、提升权限管理的一致性，同时提升安全性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Prompt-to-Excalidraw demo with Gemma 4 E2B in the browser (3.1GB)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Prompt 转 Excalidraw 的浏览器演示（Gemma 4 E2B，3.1GB）
items.summary_en: Demonstrates a browser-based pipeline that turns natural language prompts into Excalidraw sketches using Gemma 4 E2B models loaded in WASM. With a hefty 3.1GB model, it showcases the feasibility of offline, in-browser creative generation and the practical limits of client-side AI tools.
items.summary_zh: 展示了一个在浏览器中运行的管线，能将自然语言提示转化为 Excalidraw 草图，使用 Gemma 4 E2B 模型以 WASM 形式加载。模型体积达到 3.1GB，体现了离线、浏览器端创作生成的可行性，同时也揭示了客户端 AI 工具在资源和性能上的现实限制。

items.title_en: A cache-friendly IPv6 LPM with AVX-512 (linearized B+-tree, real BGP benchmarks)
items.title_zh: 基于 AVX-512 的缓存友好 IPv6 LPM（线性化 B+ 树，真实 BGP 基准测试）
items.summary_en: A cache-friendly IPv6 LPM designed around AVX-512 uses a linearized B+-tree to boost route lookups under real BGP workloads. Benchmarks show meaningful improvements for high-speed routers and network software, with implications for future data-plane design.
items.summary_zh: 基于 AVX-512 的缓存友好 IPv6 LPM 通过线性化 B+ 树提升实际 BGP 工作负载下的路由查找速度。基准测试显示对高带宽路由器和网络软件有显著提升，对未来数据平面设计具有潜在影响。

items.title_en: SDF Public Access Unix System
items.title_zh: SDF 公共访问 UNIX 系统
items.summary_en: Spotlights SDF, a long-running public UNIX system offering shell access, mail, and other services, highlighting its community-driven resilience and ongoing relevance for hobbyists and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 SDF——一个历史悠久的公共 UNIX 系统，提供 shell 访问、邮件等服务，展示其社区驱动的韧性与对爱好者、研究者的持续吸引力。

items.title_en: Modern Rendering Culling Techniques
items.title_zh: 现代渲染裁剪技术
items.summary_en: Modern rendering relies on advanced culling to skip unseen geometry, boosting frame rates. The piece reviews techniques from occlusion to frustum and mesh-level pruning, with tradeoffs for real-time graphics.
items.summary_zh: 现代渲染通过先进的裁剪技术跳过不可见几何体，提升帧率。文章回顾从遮挡剔除到视锥裁剪、网格级别剔除等方法及其在实时图形中的权衡。

items.title_en: I wrote a CHIP-8 emulator in my own programming language
items.title_zh: 我用自己的编程语言写了一个 CHIP-8 仿真器
items.summary_en: A CHIP-8 emulator was implemented using a self-made programming language, illustrating how language design can simplify implementing classic VM targets. The project demonstrates portability and the educational value of building language ecosystems around small, approachable targets. It offers a tangible example of how language features can map neatly to a simple emulator.
items.summary_zh: 作者用自创的编程语言实现了 CHIP-8 仿真器，展示了语言设计如何让实现简洁直观。此类练手项目有助于理解指令集、虚拟机实现与跨平台移植的要点。

items.title_en: Game devs explain the tricks involved with letting you pause a game
items.title_zh: 游戏开发者揭秘暂停游戏背后的技术技巧
items.summary_en: Pausing a game is more than freezing the screen. It requires carefully suspending the game loop, physics, and timers while keeping audio and other subsystems coherent. In multiplayer and lockstep scenarios, pausing becomes far from trivial, so developers use tricks like time scaling, separate render-only states, or input buffering to ensure a consistent experience.
items.summary_zh: 暂停游戏不仅仅是将画面停下。需要精确地暂停游戏循环、物理仿真和计时器，同时保持音频等子系统的连贯。在多人或锁步场景下，暂停远非易事，开发者会使用时间缩放、仅渲染状态分离或输入缓冲等技巧来保证体验的一致性。

items.title_en: Show HN: A lightweight way to make agents talk without paying for API usage
items.title_zh: Show HN：一种轻量化方式让代理无需依赖付费 API 就能对话
items.summary_en: Presents a lightweight approach to enabling agents to talk without paid API usage, likely using local models or offline reasoning. Discusses trade-offs in performance, privacy, and cost.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一种轻量化的方法让代理可以在本地模型或离线环境中对话，避免昂贵的 API 调用。同时讨论了性能、成本和隐私方面的取舍。

items.title_en: Up to 8M Bees Are Living in an Underground Network Beneath This Cemetery
items.title_zh: 墓园地下网络中的蜂群：多达800万只蜜蜂
items.summary_en: Scientists have mapped an underground bee network under a cemetery housing up to eight million bees, revealing a surprisingly complex subterranean ecosystem. The find informs urban pollinator habitats and resilience of city ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 科学家在墓园下方发现一个地下蜂群网络，数量高达800万只，揭示了一个相当复杂的地下生态系统。此发现为城市授粉者栖息地及城市生态的韧性提供新视角。

items.title_en: Focused microwaves allow 3D printers to fuse circuits onto almost anything
items.title_zh: 定向微波让3D打印机在几乎任何材料上融合电路
items.summary_en: Focused microwaves enable 3D printers to fuse circuits onto a wide range of substrates, enabling rapid electronic prototyping and new form factors.
items.summary_zh: 定向微波技术使3D打印机能够在广泛材料基底上融合电路，显著提升快速原型设计和定制化外形的潜力。

items.title_en: I Made the "Next-Level" Camera and I love it
items.title_zh: 我做了“下一代”相机，我真的很喜欢
items.summary_en: An individual shares building a so-called 'next-level' camera, detailing design choices, improvements, and why the creator loves the result.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享打造的“下一代”相机，阐述设计选择与改进，以及对成品的喜爱与感受。

items.title_en: Kefir C17/C23 Compiler
items.title_zh: Kefir C17/C23 编译器
items.summary_en: Kefir announces a C17/C23 compiler, highlighting efforts to explore alternative toolchains in the C ecosystem. The project hints at potential gains in safety, performance, and standard conformance for developers.
items.summary_zh: Kefir 公布面向 C17/C23 的编译器，凸显对 C 生态中替代工具链的探索。此项目或在安全性、性能与标准兼容性方面为开发者带来潜在收益。

items.title_en: 4-bit floating point FP4
items.title_zh: 4 位浮点数 FP4
items.summary_en: Introducing FP4, a compact 4-bit floating-point format for resource-constrained tasks, examining its precision, performance, and suitability for ML or embedded workloads. Discusses trade-offs between hardware simplicity and numerical accuracy.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 FP4，这是一种用于资源受限任务的四位浮点数格式，分析其精度、性能及在 ML 与嵌入式场景中的适用性，并探讨硬件简化与数值精度之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Chernobyl's last wedding
items.title_zh: 切尔诺贝尔的最后一场婚礼
items.summary_en: A human-interest piece recounting the last wedding near the Chernobyl area, reflecting on memory, resilience, and the enduring footprint of the disaster. It foregrounds personal narratives amid historical tragedy.
items.summary_zh: 回顾在切尔诺贝尔区域举行的最后一场婚礼，关注记忆、韧性以及灾难留下的持续烙印。通过个人叙事揭示历史悲剧中的人性光芒。

items.title_en: Hot-wiring the Lisp machine
items.title_zh: 热连 Lisp 机：动手改造早期 Lisp 机器
items.summary_en: A hands-on exploration of reviving or modifying a Lisp machine, a historic Lisp-oriented computer. Discusses hardware hacks, OS considerations, and lessons for retrocomputing enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: 介绍对 Lisp 机器的复兴或改造，聚焦硬件改装、操作系统以及在复古计算社群中的实践经验。

items.title_en: Ternary Bonsai: Top Intelligence at 1.58 Bits
items.title_zh: 三值盆景：以1.58比特实现的顶级智能
items.summary_en: Ternary Bonsai showcases an ultra-efficient AI model that operates with only 1.58 bits of information per decision, challenging assumptions about model size and performance. The approach combines ternary quantization and sparsity with principled optimization to enable smaller, cheaper models that still perform well on real tasks.
items.summary_zh: 三值盆景展示一种极致高效的AI模型，利用仅1.58比特的信息量来做出决策，挑战对模型大小与性能的传统认知。通过三值量化和稀疏化等技巧实现更小、更省资源的模型，同时保持在真实任务上的表现。

items.title_en: Mechanical Keyboard Sounds – A listening Museum
items.title_zh: 机械键盘声音——一个聆听博物馆
items.summary_en: A data-driven collection of acoustic profiles for different keyboard switches and keycaps, exploring how hardware design shapes sound. The project invites readers to explore the sonic textures of typing.
items.summary_zh: 该项目以数据可视化方式收集不同机械键盘的声音特征，展示按键声与触感之间的关系。通过声音档案，读者可以直观比较不同开关、结构对音色的影响。

items.title_en: I learned Unity the wrong way
items.title_zh: 我用错法学习 Unity
items.summary_en: The author reflects on learning Unity the hard way, sharing rookie pitfalls like skipping fundamentals, overreliance on templates, and neglecting performance profiling. The piece advocates a steadier approach: start small, understand the component model, and prioritize performance and cross-platform considerations. Practical tips help newcomers build robust, scalable Unity projects.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享在学习 Unity 时走的弯路，提醒初学者避免对组件模型、场景层级和性能分析的忽视。文章给出更稳妥的学习路径与开发实践要点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Shader Lab, like Photoshop but for shaders
items.title_zh: Show HN：Shader Lab——像 Photoshop 一样的着色器编辑器
items.summary_en: A browser-based shader editor with live preview and a familiar workflow to create and iterate shader code. The project showcases approachable tooling for graphics programmers, lowering the barrier to experiment with complex visual effects.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个基于浏览器的着色器编辑器，支持实时预览、直观的工作流，便于快速创作和调试着色器代码。该工具降低了图形程序员尝试复杂视觉效果的门槛，展示了面向一般开发者的可用性设计。

items.title_en: Zero-copy protobuf and ConnectRPC for Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 的零拷贝 Protobuf 与 ConnectRPC
items.summary_en: A technical overview of zero-copy protobuf patterns in Rust using ConnectRPC, showing how to minimize allocations and copies in RPC workloads. It highlights practical gains in latency and memory safety, and discusses tradeoffs when adopting zero-copy patterns.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 Rust 中通过零拷贝 Protobuf 与 ConnectRPC 来减少 RPC 场景中的拷贝和分配，展示对延迟与内存安全的实际提升，并讨论采用零拷贝模式的取舍。

items.title_en: Monumental ship burial beneath ancient Norwegian mound predates the Viking Age
items.title_zh: 挪威古墩下的巨型船葬早于维京时代
items.summary_en: Archaeologists have uncovered a monumental ship burial beneath an ancient mound in Norway, dating to before the Viking Age. The discovery shifts the timeline of Norse burial practices and maritime capabilities, offering new clues about prehistoric social structure.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家在挪威一座古墩下发现一座大型船葬，年代早于维京时代。这一发现将挪威早期葬俗与海上工艺的时间线向前推进，提供关于史前社会结构的新线索。

items.title_en: How Motorola’s 2N2222 and 2N3904 transistors became the default NPNs
items.title_zh: 摩托罗拉的 2N2222 与 2N3904 晶体管如何成为默认的 NPN
items.summary_en: An historical look at how Motorola’s 2N2222 and 2N3904 transistors became the de facto standard NPN devices, shaping electronics for decades.
items.summary_zh: 回顾摩托罗拉的 2N2222 与 2N3904 如何成为默认的 NPN 晶体管，并影响了几十年的电子设计。

items.title_en: What if database branching was easy?
items.title_zh: 如果数据库分支变得容易？
items.summary_en: Xata proposes making database branching easy to support experimentation without disrupting production data, potentially lowering risk for data science workflows.
items.summary_zh: Xata 提出让数据库分支更易用，以在不干扰生产数据的情况下进行实验，降低数据科学工作流的风险。

items.title_en: Reverse Engineering ME2's USB with a Heat Gun and a Knife
items.title_zh: 通过热风枪和刀具对 ME2 的 USB 进行逆向工程
items.summary_en: A writeup details reverse engineering the ME2 device's USB interface using simple tools like a heat gun and a knife. The approach highlights practical hardware-hacking techniques and the kinds of insights you can gain from low-cost teardown experiments.
items.summary_zh: 通过热风枪和刀具对 ME2 的 USB 进行逆向工程，展示了用基礎工具进行硬件分析的做法。此类拆解强调了低成本实验的可行性以及从中提取的设计线索。

items.title_en: Nanopass Framework: Clean Compiler Creation Language
items.title_zh: Nanopass 框架：干净的编译器创建语言
items.summary_en: Nanopass provides a modular, low-friction approach to writing compilers by composing passes. It emphasizes separation of concerns, enabling easier reasoning about correctness and transformations, and has influenced language tooling design by making compiler pipelines more approachable.
items.summary_zh: Nanopass 通过将编译过程拆分为可组合的阶段，提供模块化、低耦合的编译器构建方式。它强调职责分离，便于验证正确性并简化变换逻辑，对语言工具链设计产生了持续影响。

items.title_en: Writing string.h functions using string instructions in asm x86-64 (2025)
items.title_zh: 在 x86-64 汇编中使用字符串指令编写 string.h 函数
items.summary_en: A write-up demonstrates implementing common string.h routines in x86-64 using string instructions to squeeze extra performance, highlighting micro-optimizations and the care needed to avoid pitfalls. It shows how low-level hand-optimized code can complement modern compiler optimizations. A practical read for systems programmers chasing micro-ops gains.
items.summary_zh: 文档展示了在 x86-64 汇编中利用字符串指令实现 string.h 常用函数，凸显微优化与避免坑点的要点。该内容说明手工优化的低级代码如何与现代编译器优化共存。对追求微优化的系统程序员具有实用价值。

items.title_en: Japan's Cherry Blossom Database, 1,200 Years Old, Has a New Keeper
items.title_zh: 日本樱花数据库有新守护者，延续1,200年记录
items.summary_en: A 1,200-year cherry blossom phenology database in Japan gets a new custodian, signaling continuity for climate research and cultural records. The transfer underscores how long-running datasets enable trend analysis in bloom timing amid changing seasons.
items.summary_zh: 日本跨越1200年的樱花开花观测数据库迎来新管理员，确保长期数据的连续性。该数据对研究极端气候影响与季节性趋势具有重要价值，同时也是日本文化记忆的一部分。

items.title_en: Air Is Full of DNA
items.title_zh: 空气中充满 DNA 的发现
items.summary_en: Nature piece discusses pervasive DNA in the air, enabling environmental and forensic insights while raising privacy and biosafety considerations.
items.summary_zh: Nature 的论文揭示空气中普遍存在的 DNA，为环境监测与取证等提供新途径，同时引发隐私与生物安全方面的关切。

items.title_en: Prove you are a robot: CAPTCHAs for agents
items.title_zh: 证明你是机器人：为代理设计的验证码
items.summary_en: CAPTCHAs are being contemplated as a gatekeeping tool for AI agents, raising questions about how to distinguish automated agents from humans in dynamic environments. The concept highlights security, privacy, and governance considerations for AI-enabled systems. Practical implications include how to design robust tests that don’t hinder legitimate use.
items.summary_zh: 将 CAPTCHA 用作区分人类与代理的认证机制，反映出对AI代理安全与信任框架的探索。该思路将影响人工智能代理的设计、隐私与可用性，并对系统治理提出挑战。

items.title_en: Zero-Copy Pages in Rust: Or How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Lifetimes
items.title_zh: Rust中的零拷贝页：从生命周期中解放出来
items.summary_en: A deep dive into implementing zero-copy pages in Rust, showing how careful lifetime and borrow management can avoid data copies in database-like workloads. The piece illustrates Rust techniques for safe, high-throughput memory layouts and the trade-offs involved.
items.summary_zh: 文章深入探讨在Rust中实现零拷贝页的技巧，展示如何通过小心的生命周期与借用管理避免数据拷贝，从而提升数据库等工作负载的吞吐率。还讨论了这种做法的权衡与安全性。

items.title_en: IPC medley: message-queue peeking, io_uring, and bus1
items.title_zh: IPC 快讯：消息队列窥探、io_uring 与 bus1
items.summary_en: A compact look at IPC topics including message-queue peeking, io_uring-based I/O, and the bus1 interface, illustrating practical approaches to high-performance interprocess communication.
items.summary_zh: 简要聚焦 IPC 主题：消息队列窥探、基于 io_uring 的 I/O 以及 bus1 接口，展示高性能进程间通信的实用做法。

items.title_en: Show HN: A working reference implementation of context engineering
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个可工作的上下文工程参考实现
items.summary_en: Showcase of a working reference implementation for context engineering in prompts, focusing on managing context, chunking, and retrieval to improve robustness of AI assistants.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个可运行的上下文工程参考实现，聚焦于提示上下文的管理、分块与检索等能力，帮助构建更稳健的 AI 助手。

items.title_en: Larry Tesler: A Personal History of Modeless Text Editing and Cut/Copy-Paste (2012)
items.title_zh: Larry Tesler：无模文本编辑与剪切/复制粘贴的个人史
items.summary_en: A personal history of modeless text editing and the birth of cut/copy-paste, highlighting early UI decisions that shaped modern editing workflows. It offers lessons on how simple design choices can have lasting impact.
items.summary_zh: 关于无模文本编辑、以及剪切/复制粘贴的个人历史，回顾早期 UI 如何改变了现代编辑工作流。揭示简单设计决策的深远影响。

items.title_en: Ben Lerner's Big Feelings
items.title_zh: 本·勒纳的强烈情感
items.summary_en: Ben Lerner discusses how strong emotions drive his writing, linking intimate moments to the craft of language. The interview highlights his approach to form, voice, and the inside/outside balance of a public writer.
items.summary_zh: 本·勒纳谈及强烈情感如何推动写作，将亲密时刻与语言技艺联系起来。访谈聚焦他在形式、声音以及公众人物身份之间的张力与平衡的做法。

items.title_en: Knitout and Kniterate 3
items.title_zh: Knitout 与 Kniterate 3
items.summary_en: A hands-on look at Knitout and Kniterate 3, two tools for programmable knitting, showing how updates affect usability and fabric outcomes.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦可编程织造工具 Knitout 与 Kniterate 3 的应用更新，展示改动如何提升易用性与织物效果，涵盖工作流程改进、图案传输，以及硬件与软件的协同。

items.title_en: Epicycles All the Way Down (2025)
items.title_zh: Epicycles 全部向下：2025 年的复杂性与自我强化
items.summary_en: A reflective piece on how layers of complexity accumulate in tech, using epicycles as a metaphor for the recursive, self-reinforcing cycles seen through 2025.
items.summary_zh: 对科技领域不断叠加的复杂性进行反思，用“内圈套外圈”的隐喻讨论到2025年的循环与挑战。

items.title_en: Who Is Blake Whiting?
items.title_zh: Blake Whiting 是谁？
items.summary_en: A profile exploring Blake Whiting, examining their background, work, and impact in their field.
items.summary_zh: 对 Blake Whiting 的背景、工作与影响进行的深度探索。
